title: Citrusy Norwegian Linguine Pasta with Browned Butter and Crispy Bacon
description: Indulge in this Norwegian-inspired linguine pasta dish featuring citrus-infused browned butter, crispy bacon, and a sprinkle of parmesan cheese.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the linguine pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water and then drain the linguine.
In a large skillet, cook the bacon over medium heat until crispy. Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the butter and cook over medium heat until it starts to brown. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the freshly squeezed lemon and orange juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked linguine pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the citrus-infused browned butter. If the pasta seems dry, add a little of the reserved pasta water.
Season the pasta with salt, black pepper, and a pinch of nutmeg.
To assemble the dish, place the cooked pasta on a serving plate, top with crispy bacon, and sprinkle with parmesan cheese. Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
